titleStmt.title: SII 25.291: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 291. (A.R. No. 291 of 1908.) TIRUKKAḶITTAṬṬAI, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the central shrine in the Vēdapurīśvara temple.

The inscription begins with the meykīrtti, Pāṇḍiyaṉai-churam iṟakkiṉa (who drove the Pāṇḍya king into the forest.) and registers a grant made by his general Pirāntakaṉ Śiṟiyavēḷaṉ alias Tirukkaṟṟaḷi Pichchaṉ to provide for offerings to the temple of Śrīkuḍitiṭṭai in Vēmbāṟṟūr on the northern bank (of the Kāvērī). The donor is stated to have purchased for 156 kaḻañju of gold, a piece of land measuring half a vēli and made it rent-free before it was endowed to the temple.
Published in Ep. Ind., Vol. XII, pp. 121 ff.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pāṇṭiyaṉai curam miṟakkina perumāḷ śrī cundracoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 7 vatu vaṭakarai vempaṟṟūr
śrī kuṭittiṭṭai Uṭaiyaṟku Ipperumāḷḷukku senāpatyam cekiṟa pirāntakan ciṟiya veḷā
n nāna tirukkaṟṟaḷipiccanen Itdevaṟku tirumantra ponakattukku nān cempoṉ 100 5 10 6 kaḻa
ñcuṅkuṭuttu koṇṭu Iṟaiyili cetu kuṭutta nilamāvatu Itdevar śrī koyilukku vaṭakku tirukkuḷa
ttukku vacakku taḷi viḷāka meṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilam Araiyum Itdevaṟku tirumantraponaka
ttukku cantrādityavaṟ celvatāka Iṟaiyilicci kuṭutten pirāntakan ciṟiyaveḷān nāṉa tirukkaṟṟaḷi piccanneṉ
Digital edition of SII 25.291 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
